role: Co-director, Jame'eh, Tous, Neshat; reformist political analyst
bio: Hamid Reza Jalalipour was the co-director and publishing head of the company behind [Jame'eh](/orgs/jameeh-newspaper), [Tous](/orgs/tous-newspaper), and [Neshat](/orgs/neshat-newspaper), working alongside [Mashallah Shamsolvaezin](/people/mashallah-shamsolvaezin). He and Shamsolvaezin were jailed together without charges for 35 days after Jame'eh's closure in 1998. Jalalipour is also a sociologist and political analyst associated with Tehran University, one of the academic-reformist intellectuals who staffed the Khatami-era press.
editorial_notes: Jailed with Shamsolvaezin 35 days after Jame'eh closure. Sociologist by training. Also involved with Participation Front.
